summary: S1 audit and design-lock: re-verified the 3-layer verificationVerdict-drop diagnosis against current code; ran cross-provider design consensus (gpt-5-4 CONSENSUS-DISAGREE -> 3 accepted + 1 partial); locked the design (verdict domain collapsed to VERIFIED/ISSUES_FOUND/null, no manual/skipped token; explicit-verdict-wins-under-force precedence; soft validation; omit-null verdict events; R4 re-close invariant; PyPI-only). Produced proposal.md, verdict.md, spec scope-lock, ai-assignment.md. End-of-session cross-provider verification (gemini-pro) = VERIFIED.

reason.specifics: S2 is self-contained moderate-complexity Python implementation with clear specs + existing patterns; routed analysis recommended Sonnet-tier over Opus for cost. Read verdict.md first (it supersedes proposal.md).
